name: Marine Layer · 5mg Seltzer
description: Named after the LA morning that gives you an extra hour. Blood orange + sage + 5mg hemp-derived THC per 12oz can. The middle-dose in the Good Feels range — social without being social-heavy. Compliant in open-bucket states. Third-party tested.
dek: 5mg seltzer · blood orange + sage · El Segundo morning in a can
author: cc
source: cc 2026-04-21 — product seed. Name ties the Sky Clock's El Segundo vignette ('layer burning off, sun punching through') to a flagship SKU. Mike to confirm dosing + flavor against the actual shop listing.
